strengths: Deep distributed-systems and microservices expertise, with hands-on low-latency infrastructure experience (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby using asynchronous I/O and high-performance databases)
Current involvement in agentic AI infrastructure and frameworks, including MCP protocol code generators and agent orchestration systems
15+ years of full-stack engineering across multiple domains with multiple Staff/Senior roles, demonstrating technical breadth and proven delivery at scale
concerns: No demonstrated track record of scaling engineering teams or developing technical leadership layers at the 10-30+ person scale required for a CTO role
No fintech infrastructure experience; lacks familiarity with credit systems, payment flows, working capital management, and embedded finance
Agentic AI systems experience is very recent (April 2025) with unclear production depth, failure-mode handling, and exposure to high-stakes regulated environments
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong distributed-systems expertise and current hands-on experience in agentic AI infrastructure, but the CTO role explicitly requires demonstrated team scaling and technical leadership at 10-30+ scale—not evident in his resume. Fintech infrastructure (credit risk, working capital, trade decisioning) is core to the business and he lacks domain familiarity. His agentic AI experience is recent (April 2025) and unproven at production scale in regulated environments. A capable technical engineer with relevant systems expertise, but lacking the executive leadership maturity and domain-specific preparation this CTO role demands.
